mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.folder_path, f.display_name, f.recursive, f.enabled, f.last_ingested_at, f.last_indexed_at, f.created_at, f.updated_at, COUNT(d.id) AS document_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'PARSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS parsed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'PARSED' THEN d.chunk_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS chunk_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'PARSED' AND d.indexed_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unindexed_count FROM knowledge_folders f LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d.*, COUNT(c.id) AS chunk_count FROM documents d LEFT JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id ) d ON d.knowledge_folder_id = f.id GROUP BY f.id ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC
SELECT id, folder_path, display_name, recursive, enabled, last_ingested_at, last_indexed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_folders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, folder_path, display_name, recursive, enabled, last_ingested_at, last_indexed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_folders WHERE folder_path = #{folderPath}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_folders ( id, folder_path, display_name, recursive, enabled, last_ingested_at, last_indexed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{folderPath}, #{displayName}, #{recursive}, #{enabled}, #{lastIngestedAt}, #{lastIndexedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(folder_path) DO UPDATE SET display_name = excluded.display_name, recursive = excluded.recursive, enabled = excluded.enabled, last_ingested_at = excluded.last_ingested_at, last_indexed_at = excluded.last_indexed_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
